title: Senior Teacher - Arihant Publications South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Arihant Publications South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Arihant Publications South Asia Partners family as a Senior Teacher in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Arihant Publications South Asia Partners:
Arihant Publications South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications South Asia Partners!
